no: Skeletal necromancer NPC for BG2/ToB/EET. Found in the Gate District (AR0400). Has SoA and ToB content with companion quest, journal entries, and custom voice. EET-native via EET_NPC_TRANSITION. English only.
sum: Adds Valkrana, a skeletal necromancer NPC to BG2, found above the Copper Coronet, with voiced lines, a character quest, undead racial traits, and unique spellcasting focus.

co.n: Valkrana Companion NPC Mod for BG2EE
co.no: Adds Valkrana as a joinable NPC with SoA and ToB content.
